articles.title: Solana’s Jupiter DEX Sees $480M in Trading Volume Amid Airdrop Excitement
articles.description: Jupiter DEX on Solana hits $480M in trades, beating Ethereum's Uniswap, driven by new memecoin 'Wen' and major stablecoin activity.
